title: eryngium rosei
intro: Eryngium rosei, also known as Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Eryngium rosei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
